_note: REAL CUSTOM-FORMULA DEMO (attacker + target dependent). damage = max(1, attacker.PA*10 - target.Faith), computed LIVE from BOTH units. The attacker is resolved by CT (+0x41 reset = the unit that just acted); the target is the unit whose HP changed. Engine owns death (MinHpFloor=1: lethal results leave the unit at 1 HP and the engine's own next chip kills it). Requires: (a) the CT-resolution DLL deployed, (b) the neuter data mod deployed (so vanilla damage is a small placeholder our formula overrides). Rewrite is GUARDED by a.present, so a hit only shows our number when the attacker was resolved -- proving the number is attacker-derived. TEST: 1) attack the SAME target with TWO different attackers (different PA) -> damage must differ. 2) attack TWO different targets (different Faith) with the SAME attacker -> damage must differ. Any target (ally via friendly-fire, or foe) works.
